# Beudox HR Portal - Technical Context for AI Assistants

## Architecture Overview

**Frontend Application**: Single-page React application built with modern web technologies
**Backend**: Supabase (PostgreSQL database, authentication, real-time subscriptions, storage)
**Deployment**: Static site hosting (Vercel/Netlify compatible)

## Key Technologies & Patterns

### Frontend Stack
- **React 18** with TypeScript for type safety
- **Vite** for fast development and optimized builds
- **React Router** for client-side routing with protected routes
- **TanStack Query** for server state management and caching
- **React Hook Form + Zod** for form validation and submission
- **Shadcn/ui** component library built on Radix UI primitives
- **Tailwind CSS** for utility-first styling
- **TipTap** for rich text editing in HR policies

### State Management
- **Local Component State**: useState for UI state
- **Server State**: TanStack Query for API data fetching/caching
- **Global Auth State**: Custom AuthProvider context
- **Form State**: React Hook Form with controlled components

### Authentication & Security
- **Supabase Auth**: JWT-based authentication with session management
- **Role-Based Access Control**: Custom permission system with route guards
- **Mandatory Password Change**: Forced password reset on first login
- **Protected Routes**: Authentication and authorization checks on all business routes

## Application Structure

### Routing Architecture
- **Public Routes**: /login, /forgot-password
- **Protected Routes**: All business functionality wrapped in ProtectedRoute component
- **Role-Based Access**: canAccess() function checks user roles against route permissions
- **Layout Wrapper**: AppLayout provides consistent navigation and UI shell

### Component Organization
- **Pages**: Route-level components in src/pages/
- **Feature Components**: Domain-specific components (attendance/, payroll/, etc.)
- **UI Components**: Reusable primitives in src/components/ui/
- **Layout Components**: Navigation, sidebar, topbar in src/components/layout/

### Data Flow Patterns
- **API Integration**: Supabase client for database operations
- **Query Management**: TanStack Query hooks for data fetching
- **Real-time Updates**: Supabase subscriptions for live data
- **Error Handling**: Toast notifications for user feedback

## Key Business Logic

### Attendance System
- **Recording**: Check-in/check-out with validation
- **Calculations**: Working hours, overtime, late arrivals
- **Analytics**: Monthly summaries, trends, anomalies detection
- **Import**: Bulk attendance data upload with AI parsing

### Payroll Processing
- **Salary Components**: Base pay, allowances, deductions
- **Overtime Calculation**: Regular and holiday overtime rates
- **Payslip Generation**: PDF creation with detailed breakdowns
- **Tax Calculations**: Automated tax computations

### Leave Management
- **Leave Types**: Configurable leave categories (annual, sick, etc.)
- **Balance Tracking**: Accrual and usage monitoring
- **Approval Workflow**: Multi-level approval process
- **Calendar Integration**: Leave calendar with conflict detection

### Employee Lifecycle
- **Onboarding**: New employee setup with mandatory password change
- **Profile Management**: Comprehensive employee data
- **Performance Reviews**: Scheduled evaluations with rating systems
- **Offboarding**: Employee deactivation and data archiving

## Database Schema Highlights

### Core Entities
- **employees**: User accounts with roles, departments, employment details
- **attendance_records**: Daily time entries with calculations
- **leave_requests**: Leave applications with approval status
- **payroll_records**: Salary data with component breakdowns
- **projects**: Project management with team assignments
- **evaluations**: Performance reviews with criteria

### Relationships
- **Company-scoped**: Most data is scoped to company_id for multi-tenancy
- **Employee-centric**: Many tables reference employees table
- **Hierarchical**: Departments, roles, and reporting structures

## Development Workflow

### Build & Deployment
- **Development**: `npm run dev` with hot reload
- **Production Build**: `npm run build` creates optimized bundle
- **Testing**: Vitest for unit tests, Playwright for E2E
- **Linting**: ESLint with TypeScript rules

### Code Quality
- **TypeScript**: Strict type checking enabled
- **ESLint**: Code quality and consistency rules
- **Prettier**: Code formatting (via ESLint)
- **Testing**: Unit tests for utilities, E2E for critical flows

## Configuration Files

- **vite.config.ts**: Build configuration with React plugin
- **tailwind.config.ts**: CSS framework configuration
- **tsconfig.json**: TypeScript compiler options
- **eslint.config.js**: Linting rules and plugins
- **components.json**: Shadcn/ui component configuration

## Environment Variables

- **VITE_SUPABASE_URL**: Supabase project URL
- **VITE_SUPABASE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY**: Public Supabase API key

## Performance Considerations

- **Code Splitting**: Vite handles automatic chunking
- **Image Optimization**: Lazy loading and responsive images
- **Query Optimization**: TanStack Query caching and background updates
- **Bundle Size**: Tree shaking and dynamic imports

## Security Measures

- **Authentication**: Supabase handles secure authentication
- **Authorization**: Client-side role checks with server-side validation
- **Data Validation**: Zod schemas for input validation
- **CSRF Protection**: Supabase handles request security
- **CORS**: Configured for Supabase domains

## Monitoring & Debugging

- **Error Boundaries**: React error boundaries for graceful failures
- **Logging**: Console logging for development
- **Toast Notifications**: User-friendly error messaging
- **Development Tools**: React DevTools, browser dev tools

## Third-party Integrations

- **Supabase**: Database, auth, storage, real-time
- **Recharts**: Data visualization components
- **Lucide React**: Icon library
- **Date-fns**: Date manipulation utilities
- **XLSX**: Excel file processing for data import
- **React Image Crop**: Image cropping for avatars
